name: BTCS Inc.
summary: BTCS Inc. is a U.S.-based, Nasdaq-listed blockchain technology company focused on revenue generation through blockchain infrastructure and decentralized finance (DeFi) activities, primarily on the Ethereum network. The company operates three business lines: NodeOps (Ethereum validator node operations earning staking rewards), Builder+ (proprietary block building for transaction optimization), and Imperium (launched 2025, deploying digital assets into DeFi protocols as liquidity provider). BTCS uses an integrated capital strategy combining ATM equity offerings, convertible notes, and ETH-backed DeFi borrowing.

products.name: NodeOps
products.description: Ethereum validator node operations performing transaction validation, attestation, and block proposals to earn ETH-denominated staking rewards.

products.name: Builder+
products.description: Proprietary block-building operations that construct optimized transaction blocks for submission to Ethereum validators, earning fees from successfully proposed blocks.

products.name: Imperium
products.description: DeFi business line deploying ETH and stablecoins into decentralized lending, borrowing, and liquidity provision protocols to generate variable on-chain revenues.

products.name: StakeSeeker
products.description: Legacy technology service platform discontinued in 2024.

products.name: ChainQ
products.description: Legacy technology service platform discontinued in 2025.
